只愿做废宅咸鱼安稳度日的林羡，没想到最终还是被让系统背刺了！
“叮：请宿主往后保持一颗进取之心，努力修炼，切勿荒废了大好青春～”
“叮：你要不努力，不能开夏利，一个拥有上进心的人，不是在拼搏努力，就是在拼搏努力的路上～”
林羡只得看着充满上进心的自己，一路努力拼搏到了仙之巅，对此他只想表示，拥有上进心的自己简直无敌了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/05b5027c02c36e6082788b79dd42e762~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"清墨","author_id":"","book_id":"7104552135051709447","book_name":"拥有上进心的我简直无敌了","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7104810146236203527","read_count":"1","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"189862"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"69","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,腹黑,无敌,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/05b5027c02c36e6082788b79dd42e762~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779165399&x-signature=Nhx482NTIndFd7197Ip%2BtrVjMwM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read
